nasb.text: But God spoke to this effect, that his descendants would be aliens in a foreign land, and that they would be enslaved and mistreated for four hundred years.

esv.text: And God spoke to this effect—that his offspring would be sojourners in a land belonging to others, who would enslave them and afflict them four hundred years.

cnv.text: 神就這樣說：‘你的後裔必在外地寄居，人要奴役、虐待他們四百年。’

ccb.text: 上帝又说，‘你的子孙必流落异乡，受奴役、被虐待四百年。

csbs.text: 神这样说： ‘他的后裔要在他人之地做寄居的， 那里的人要奴役、虐待他们四百年。
